---
title: "Shiny App"
description: |
  A Shiny App displaying California snow depth data 
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(here)
```

[California Snow Depth Shiny App](https://marierivers.shinyapps.io/snow_shiny_app/)

![shiny app image](images/snow_shiny_app.png)
